---
title: "Lecture 9: Data Structures, Base R"
date: 2025-07-24
summary: "<strong>Intro to Data Structures and Base R</strong>"
url_slides: 09-slides.qmd
url_code: https://github.com/brinsab/csp-materials/09-baser
page-layout: full
draft: false
---

**Summary**: {< meta summary >}

**Code**: Copy and run in your console: `usethis::use_course("{< meta url_code >}")`

## Topics

## Before Class

## Readings
